title: tragacantha griffithii
intro: Tragacantha griffithii, also known as Griffith's spiny thistle or Silybum griffithii, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of liver and gallbladder disorders due to its high content of silymarin, a flavonoid complex. The health benefits of Tragacantha griffithii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help protect against liver damage, improve digestion, and support immune function. Tragacantha griffithii is typically prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, or as a tea, to capitalize on its medicinal properties.
